chapter_title: Obedience to and Effect of Traffic Laws
text: For purposes of this article, an electric personal assistive mobility device is defined in Section 313.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 11. RULES OF THE ROAD [21000 - 23336]
### Chapter 1. Obedience to and Effect of Traffic Laws [21000 - 21300]
#### Article 6. Electric Personal Assistive Mobility Devices [21280 - 21282]
##### § 21280.5

For purposes of this article, an electric personal assistive mobility device is defined in Section 313.

*(Added by Stats. 2002, Ch. 979, Sec. 6. Effective January 1, 2003. Section operative March 1, 2003, pursuant to Section 21283 (later repealed).)*
